PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Dec-06-2016 Continued To Apr-04-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Howard Frank for (personal representative) Sherry Donis.

The Court stated that notice has to be given with no exceptions. Mr. Frank stated that he will do that, explained that there are no assets, that per 9202 he only has to notice the Franchise Tax Board, that there is no prejudice to them, that 9203 gives public agencies remedies when not given notice, that 9202 does not preclude the Court from granting the petition and that they will only be coming back in 4 months to say that notice was given. The Court instructed counsel to file a declaration regarding allegations in 9202(a)&(b). The Petition to Terminate Estate was continued to April 4, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Yolanda Mazariegos. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
